title: microchilus densiflorus
intro: Microchilus densiflorus, also known as the tropical orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving digestive issues. It is typically prepared as a decoction or tincture, and can also be used in herbal teas and infusions.
